name: Moliat Yusuf
ai_summary: Moliat Yusuf is a compassionate candidate with up to three years of experience teaching children aged toddlers to five at a local church. Based in Atlanta, GA, they are available full- or part-time and believe their love for children and ability to set a good example make them a strong fit for UpKid.
